notes: This is the original ATEM Mini Extreme ISO (SKU: SWATEMMINICEXTISO, introduced February 2021), distinct from the 2025 G2 variant. Key differences vs. G2: 2 HDMI outputs (G2 has 3), 3.5mm TRS audio inputs (G2 has XLR combo), single 1G Ethernet (G2 has dual 1G+10G), no Thunderbolt (G2 has Thunderbolt), no CFexpress slot (G2 only), no MADI/BNC (G2 only). HDMI input/output grade inferred as HDMI 1.4 based on max resolution support (up to 1080p60). USB grade is USB 5Gbps (USB 3.1 Gen 1) per spec. HDMI output rear-panel silk-screen labeling could not be confirmed from authoritative source; procam.com and avlfx.com are secondary retail sources. B&H source URL returned 403 at time of research; best available secondary sources used. Headphone output listed as trs-3.5 (some sources note TRRS, but connector body is standard 3.5mm).
